case_title: BOLECHOWSKI MICAHEL MR AND MRS VS MIRALOMA CLEANERS

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLECHOWSKI MICAHEL MR AND MRS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRALOMA CLEANERS $1,872.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,887.00, DEFT DID NOT SHOW UP BUT SENT REP WHO WAS ALLOWED TO TESTIFY BUT NOT REPRESENT THEM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MIRALOMA CLEANERS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,577.00 FILED BY BOLECHOWSKI MICAHEL MR AND MRS AS TO DEFENDANT MIRALOMA CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLECHOWSKI MICAHEL MR AND MRS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRALOMA CLEANERS $1,310.40 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.40, CLAIM OF $1872 WAS REDUCED BY 30% STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
UNTIMELY POS, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO COURT DATE ON SUB SERVICE.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MIRALOMA CLEANERS HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-20-1994, GRANTED
